patient_ref.note: File cannot be parsed, so no patient information is available.

expected_extraction.note: Text extraction never completes — the PDF is truncated/corrupt (no valid xref, no %%EOF).

notes: The PDF read/parse step throws a technical exception (corrupt file). Per REFramework this is a System Exception: retry up to the configured limit, capture a screenshot/log, then escalate. Distinct from REF-014 (Business Exception): the distinguishing axis is 'could the file be read at all?' — REF-015 cannot be read (technical), REF-014 reads fine but is the wrong document type (business).
